headline: Holley (HLLY) Stock Fair Value Falls As Analysts Trim Targets But Keep Coverage
summary: Holley’s updated analyst work includes a reduced fair value estimate, with the price target moving from US$5.17 to US$4.67. Rather than abandoning coverage, analysts appear to be fine tuning their models around this lower target while still treating Holley as an earnings driven story. As you read on, you will see how these price target shifts fit into the broader narrative and what to watch to stay aligned with the evolving view on the stock.
